runTitle: Local Playwright QA - AI Workspace Phase 5 Layout

environment.backend: local mocked/static dashboard data plus existing dev prewarm

coveredSurfaces: Local /dashboard/ai-assistant route rendered with title AI Assistant | OpenManager AI
AI workspace header and function tabs visible: AI Chat, 장애 보고서, 이상감지/추세
Desktop server context panel rendered with hidden lg:flex responsive classes
Server context empty state visible before a server is mentioned
Browser console reported 0 errors and 0 warnings
Next.js runtime diagnostics reported no errors in the active browser session
No chat/job/stream AI request was triggered; only the existing /api/ai/wake-up prewarm request appeared
skippedSurfaces: Conversational AI QA was skipped because this Phase 5 follow-up changed local UI layout and message presentation, not prompts, routing, provider selection, tool schemas, response parsing, or output contracts
Vercel production QA was skipped because this is a post-main local verification run before any semver tag deployment
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints were not in scope for this local UI verification

expertAssessments.rationale: The changed AI workspace route rendered the desktop server context panel, empty state, and header function tabs without visual/runtime errors in local browser automation.
The run combined real browser rendering, console checks, and Next.js runtime diagnostics for the changed surface while avoiding unnecessary live LLM validation.

artifacts.label: AI workspace server context panel screenshot

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard UX Phase 5 AI workspace layout verified on local browser QA
completedImprovements.evidence: Local Playwright/Next DevTools QA verified /dashboard/ai-assistant server context panel, empty state, function tabs, console cleanliness, and Next.js runtime diagnostics.

notes: This was a local UI QA because Phase 5 changed layout/message presentation only. The app still emitted the existing /api/ai/wake-up prewarm request, but no chat/job/stream AI execution path was triggered.
